notes: Roman noblewoman known for penitence and founding a hospital at Portus; mentioned by Jerome.

docs.excerpt: Fabiola believed she had acted legitimately in divorcing her husband and was free to remarry. She did not know that the rigor of the gospel forbids women all pretext for remarriage as long as their former
